summary: Added aerc terminal email client with notmuch backend to NixOS/Home Manager configuration. Configured notmuch for email indexing with automatic tagging, aerc with vim-style keybindings and dual-account support (Gmail + Logos), and Neovim integration via mail.lua plugin providing <leader>me for aerc, <leader>mS for mail sync, and <leader>mf for notmuch search.

artifacts.summary: Added programs.notmuch and programs.aerc configurations with accounts and querymaps
Neovim plugin for aerc/notmuch integration with keybindings

completion_data.completion_summary: Configured aerc terminal email client with notmuch backend, vim keybindings, dual-account support (Gmail/Logos), and Neovim integration for a comprehensive terminal email workflow.

next_steps: Run 'home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin' to activate, then 'notmuch new' to create initial database
